test_classify_detects_curation_patterns with data set "iri without taxonomy"
test_returns_null_for_invalid_doi_inputs with data set "not a doi"
test_approval_notification_content with data set "final revoke molecule"
test_approval_notification_content with data set "final revoke citation"
test_accepts_only_exact_gnf_profiles_by_default with data set "exact with non-zero edit distance rejected"
